🎀 Happy Birthday, Haritha! 🎀

🌟 Our Unbreakable Bond · 2022 → Forever 🌟
“ Friendship isn't about never fighting — it's about finding your way back to each other, again and again. From 2022 to this very day, every laugh, every tear, and even every little argument made our story more real and precious. You are my sunshine on cloudy days, Haritha. Happy Birthday, my dearest friend! ”
